creatorEconomy.title: Creator Economy
creatorEconomy.desc: Hybrid model for user-created events: vote fee + quality-gated creator rewards.
creatorEconomy.voteFeeDesc: Every vote on a user event pays a small BNB fee.
creatorEconomy.splitDesc: 50% goes to creator rewards, 50% to protocol distribution.
creatorEconomy.unlockDesc: Creator payout unlocks after valid resolution, minimum unique votes, and verified creator status.
creatorEconomy.batchDesc: Protocol-side vote fees from user-created events are distributed every 12 hours to reduce gas overhead per vote.

litepaperPage.subtitle: Litepaper v1.0 — March 2026
litepaperPage.chainDesc: Decentralized AI Prediction Market on BNB Chain
litepaperPage.visionP1: OracleAI Predict is building the world's most engaging prediction market, where artificial intelligence generates real-world events, users compete to predict outcomes, and the entire system runs transparently on-chain.
litepaperPage.visionP2: Our mission: make prediction markets accessible, entertaining, and rewarding for everyone - not just traders. By combining AI-powered event generation, gamified participation mechanics, and fair token distribution, we create a platform where knowledge and intuition translate into real value.

1.title: Boring & Complex
1.desc: Traditional prediction markets require deep domain expertise and are intimidating for casual users.

2.title: Centralized
2.desc: Platforms like Polymarket rely on centralized resolution. Users must trust the operator.

3.title: No Engagement Loop
3.desc: Most platforms lack gamification - no streaks, no leaderboards, and no social features to drive retention.

litepaperPage.solutionIntro: OracleAI Predict solves all three problems with a unique AI + blockchain + gamification stack:

aiGeneration.title: AI Event Generation
aiGeneration.desc: OracleAI Event Engine, our proprietary AI stack, continuously analyzes live data and generates high-relevance prediction events every 90 minutes across 5 categories.

aiVerification.title: AI Result Verification
aiVerification.desc: When events expire, AI searches the web for actual outcomes - real scores, real prices, real results. No human intervention needed.

gamification.title: Gamified Engagement
gamification.desc: Daily check-ins with streaks, 4-tier staking, 6-level referrals, weekly leaderboard prizes, achievement badges. Every action earns points.

onchain.title: Fully On-Chain
onchain.desc: All fees, points, predictions, and votes are recorded on BNB Chain smart contracts. Transparent, immutable, trustless.

1.title: Connect Wallet
1.desc: MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or any Web3 wallet. No registration, no KYC.

2.title: Daily Check-In
2.desc: Choose Basic (0.0015 BNB), Pro (0.01 BNB), or Whale (0.05 BNB). Earn 100 to 1,000 points per check-in. Build streaks for up to +50% bonus.

3.title: Predict Events
3.desc: Vote Agree or Disagree on AI-generated predictions. Correct prediction = +50 pts. Beat the AI = +100 bonus.

4.title: Climb Leaderboard
4.desc: Up to 1,000 players share 50% of all weekly fees in BNB via dynamic payouts.

5.title: Earn $OAI Airdrop
5.desc: All accumulated points convert proportionally to OAI tokens at TGE. 40% of supply (400M tokens) reserved for community airdrop.

litepaperPage.tokenSupply: Total Supply: 1,000,000,000 OAI - Deflationary by design

deflationItems.1: 10% of fees buy back OAI + burn forever

items.5: Pre-TGE growth campaign and ecosystem onboarding
100K+ daily active users and treasury target: $4-15M

litepaperPage.pointsToOaiDesc: During TGE week, conversion is calculated from a transparent snapshot formula:
litepaperPage.pointsAfterTgeDesc: Points remain as a seasonal reputation layer for leaderboards, quests, campaign eligibility, and partner incentives.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyFlow1: User event creation keeps fixed listing fee for anti-spam.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyFlow2: Each vote on user events pays a small vote fee.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyFlow3: Vote fee splits into creator side and protocol side.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyFlow4: Protocol side follows the same treasury/prize/referral/burn/staking logic.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyFlow5: Protocol-side fee distribution is executed in 12-hour batches to reduce gas overhead per vote.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyQuality1: Creator payout is claimable only after event is resolved.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyQuality2: Minimum voter threshold must be reached.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyQuality3: Creator must hold verified creator status at payout time.
litepaperPage.creatorEconomyQuality4: If conditions fail, creator-side fee is redirected to protocol safety treasury.
litepaperPage.footerTagline: OracleAI Predict - Decentralized AI Prediction Market on BNB Chain

predictions.willGenerate: New predictions will be generated automatically

predictions.checkInModalSubtitle: You must complete today's check-in before voting. Choose a tier:
predictions.checkInModalAction: Check In ({amount} BNB) and continue voting
predictions.userCreateTitleInput: Will BTC close above 80k by Friday?
predictions.connectToCreate: Connect wallet to create an event
predictions.userCreateWarnQuestionMark: Question should end with '?' for clarity.
predictions.userCreateErrTitleLength: Title must be between 12 and 180 characters.
predictions.userCreateErrDeadlineRange: Deadline must be within 10 minutes to 14 days.
predictions.userCreateErrDuplicate: A similar active event already exists.
predictions.userCreateErrBinary: Question is not clearly binary (YES/NO). Clarify conditions and deadline.
predictions.userCreateErrClarify: Question is too vague. Add measurable condition and clear deadline.
predictions.userCreateErrLanguage: Language detected. Keep the question clear and binary (YES/NO).
predictions.userCreateErrAiRejected: AI validation rejected this event. Please rephrase.
predictions.creatorCannotVoteOwn: You cannot vote on your own event.
predictions.shareInvite: Predict with AI on OracleAI Predict
predictions.connectToShareRef: Connect wallet to share with your referral link
predictions.discordCopyFailed: Failed to copy Discord share text

aboutPage.title: We help communities predict with clarity, not hype.
aboutPage.intro: OracleAI Predict started with one question: why do smart teams still make expensive market decisions with weak signals? We built a platform that blends machine learning and verifiable on-chain data, so every decision has context, confidence, and accountability.
aboutPage.belief1: Signals should be transparent, not mysterious.
aboutPage.belief2: Communities should be rewarded for high-quality participation.
aboutPage.belief3: Forecasting tools should be usable by non-technical teams.
aboutPage.deliver1: AI-assisted prediction events with clear confidence scoring.
aboutPage.deliver2: On-chain rewards and referrals with full traceability.
aboutPage.deliver3: A polished, mobile-first interface optimized for conversion.

featuresPage.title: Everything your team needs to forecast, engage, and scale.
featuresPage.subtitle: OracleAI Predict is designed around one goal: improve decisions while increasing user retention and trust.

ai.title: Adaptive AI Forecasting
ai.body: Generate high-signal predictions with real-time updates from market data and sentiment context.

incentives.body: Reward participation through transparent points, staking boosts, and referral logic.

leaderboard.body: Drive healthy competition and recurring engagement with merit-based rankings.

api.body: Access event streams and confidence metrics for your own dashboards and automations.
